dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal detects failed breakouts at support/resistance with reversal on same bar. Entry conditions use pivot points (s1/r1) as proxies for support/resistance levels. Entry occurs when price probes beyond level (prev_high/prev_low) but closes back inside (close conditions). Volume confirmation added. Exit reverses back through support/resistance on close. Stop loss set to 1.5x typical bar range (atr_14 unavailable for direct use, so percentage used). Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT: LONG when probing above resistance that fails, SHORT when probing below support that fails. bars_allowed_for_close_back parameter (0) enforced by using same-bar reversal logic.

Entry occurs when price probes beyond level (prev_high/prev_low) but closes back inside (close conditions). Volume confirmation added. Exit reverses back through support/resistance on close. Stop loss set to 1.5x typical bar range (atr_14 unavailable for direct use, so percentage used). Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT: LONG when probing above resistance that fails, SHORT when probing below support that fails. bars_allowed_for_close_back parameter (0) enforced by using same-bar reversal logic.

source_rule_text: Enter a trade on the close of a bar that fails to hold beyond a support or resistance level after probing it, signaling weak conviction in the breakout direction.
